steps.title: Pivot from limit to achievement
steps.content: The text first says the painting does not technically represent a fourth dimension. The next sentence pivots to what it still achieves through multiple, simultaneous perspectives.

steps.title: Choose a concession transition
steps.content: A would simply add information, C would restate the previous sentence, and D would introduce an example. The matching transition acknowledges the limitation and then shifts to the painting's achievement. The answer is B.
